business.headline: Gold, silver prices today: Why is silver falling more than gold?On the Multi Commodity Exchange (MCX), gold futures were trading at Rs 1,49,283 at 11:15 am, down Rs 4,425 or 2.88%. Silver futures saw a steeper fall. Prices were at Rs 2,28,891, down Rs 14,610 or 6.00%.

India's retail boom is hiding a Rs 2,000 crore problemIndia's retail boom is moving faster than ever on the surface, but inside, slow and messy inventory movement is quietly holding back efficiency, profitability and the next phase of growth.

Government waives customs duty on key petrochemical imports amid West Asia warThe Finance Ministry has reduced duty to nil on 40 petrochemical products, with the exemption coming into effect from April 2 and remaining in force till June 30, 2026.

Sensex crashes after Trump's speech on Iran war; Rs 10 lakh crore wiped outThe stock market saw a sharp sell-off, with the Sensex falling over 1,500 points and the Nifty dropping over2%, slipping below the 22,200 mark.

He warned of strong military action, including potential strikes on oil infrastructure, even as he said diplomatic talks are still ongoing.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market crash after Trump's fresh speech?Early indicators suggest a soft start. GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 22,359 at 7:41 am, pointing to a gap-down opening for the Nifty 50, which had closed at 22,679.40 in the previous session.

Paying over Rs 50,000 rent? Don't ignore this 2% TDS ruleIf your rent crosses Rs 50,000 a month, there's more to do than just paying your landlord on time. A key TDS rule applies, and missing it could lead to extra costs.

From LPG to ATM charges: 7 changes hitting your everyday finances from todayYour daily expenses may not stay the same this year. Starting today, changes in LPG prices, ATM usage rules and more are set to impact how you manage your money.

Jet fuel price hiked: Will your flight tickets cost more?With ATF prices rising and global oil markets volatile, how will the hike impact domestic and international flight travel in the days ahead? Read on to find out.

From HRA to gift vouchers: 9 big income tax changes affecting you from April 1A new financial year often brings fresh rules, and this time is no different. Starting April 1, multiple income tax changes, from allowances to workplace perks, are set to influence your day-to-day finances. Let's have a look.

Garden Reach shares jump 18%: Why GRSE stock price rose today?GRSE's strong financial results boost investor confidence and lift shipbuilding stocks. GRSE reported a record annual turnover of Rs 6,400 crore for FY26, compared to Rs 5,076 crore in the previous financial year, marking a 26% rise.

entertainment.headline: Aakhri Sawaal teaser: Sanjay Dutt vs Namashi in a story of questions and conflict Aakhri Sawaal pits Sanjay Dutt against Namashi Chakraborty in a tale of questions and ideological conflict rooted in India's historical debates. The film is set to release on May 8, 2026.

Malayalam director Ranjith suspended by film body over sexual assault claims Malayalam director-producer Ranjith Balakrishnan was arrested by Kerala police following a sexual assault complaint. He has now been suspended by Film Employees Federation of Kerala (FEFKA).

Ramayana Part 2 shoot begins as VFX-heavy work on Part 1 moves full steam ahead The makers of Ramayana have quietly begun shooting Part 2 even as VFX-heavy post-production on Part 1 gathers pace. With indoor shoots and global-scale planning underway, the ambitious epic is moving faster than expected.

While fans are loving the scale and craft, many are eager to see more of Yash's Ravana ahead of its Diwali release.

Rahul Arunoday Banerjee death: No doctor at clinic, says production house The production company, Moments Motion Pictures, issued an official statement over the death of Bengali actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee. Cocktail 2: Shahid, Kriti and Rashmika's song Jab Talak out on April 8 The new posters of Homi Adajania's Cocktail 2 were unveiled on April 1 along with the date announcement for the song Jab Talak. The track featuring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna will be released on April 8.

general news.headline: SC hauls Mamata govt over the coals after SIR officers held hostage for 9 hoursSeven judicial officers, including three women, involved in the SIR process in poll-bound West Bengal were held hostage by a group of protesters over the deletion of names from the electoral rolls.

Live: Vijay files second nomination for Tamil Nadu polls from Trichy East seatAssembly Election News 2026 Live Updates: Bengal Leader of Opposition Suvendu Adhikari is set to file his nomination papers from Bhabanipur today, mounting a direct challenge to Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in her stronghold. Adhikari will be accompanied by Home Minister Amit Shah and other BJP leaders. In Tamil Nadu, TVK chief Vijay is set to file his nomination for the Trichy East constituency and will campaign in the city. Campaigning across five states and a UT gathered pace, with Prime Minister Narendra Modi leading rallies in Assam on Wednesday. Meanwhile, the Chief Electoral Officer's office in West Bengal issued a warning after Trinamool Congress workers staged protests over allegations that the BJP illegally submitted Form 6 applications to manipulate voter rolls. Follow indiatoday.in for the latest updates.

It's all about oilAs Iran solidifies its grip on the Strait of Hormuz, the crucial oil corridor, businessman Trump seems to have smelled an opportunity - buy oil and gas from America. The decision also comes amid growing pressure after Max Verstappen hinted at a possible retirement.
